name: Angel Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients (yeast, flour, sugar, salt) together into a mixing bowl.
2. Add the softened yeast and mix in the buttermilk and oil until well combined.
Let it rise until doubled in size.
3. Punch down the dough and shape into rolls.
4. Let the rolls rise again until doubled in size.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
